calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-11-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge Ronald Quidachay, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee, CSR: Robert Balian

9am - C/C FOR DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING; PLTF COUNSEL JAN A. GRUEN PRESENT; TESTIMONY HEARD; MATTER GRANTED AS FOLLOWS: PLTF SHALL HAVE & RECOVER POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 1245 SOUTH VAN NESS, SF, CA 94110 EFFECTIVE 12/2/10; WRIT OF POSSESSION TO ISSUE; SUBLEASE FORFEITED & TERMINATED; PLTF SHALL RECOVER FROM DEFT THE SUM OF $552,000.; ORDER SIGNED BY COURT
